description: Trigger + expectation evals for the 5-voice DS governance council. Fair-ML BLOCK on EEOC 80% rule violation is unconditional. Missing metadata is REWORK, never SHIP.

positive.prompt: Should we ship this ML model? MLflow run abc123, xgboost credit_scoring, aim_ratio 0.72
Is this defensible for production? PSI 0.28 detected on 4 features
Would compliance sign off on Brier 0.32 out-of-sample?
Are we above the EEOC 80% disparate-impact ratio?

negative.prompt: Draft an adverse-action letter for consumer credit denial
negative.reason: Consumer-facing lives with compliance-officer even for AI-driven decisions

expectations.reason: Named invariant #1: Fair-ML BLOCK on 80% rule is unconditional (EEOC 29 CFR 1607.4D). No other voice can override.
Named invariant #2: Missing metadata = REWORK, never SHIP. Reproducibility Critic non-negotiable
Named invariant #3: AA05 fires when Fair-ML BLOCK fires for consumer-facing models (CFPB Circular 2026-03 integration)
Data Steward gate — PSI drift triggers REWORK per lib/personas/ds-pack/run-ds-council.js contract
